prompt: Duration Check with Slow Progress Fill. Light neutral background (#F5F5F5). Canvas 1920x1080. Title text 'Duration Check' (48px Arial bold, color #E53935) positioned top-center within the top 20% of the canvas. A small horizontal progress bar (400px wide, 24px tall, rounded corners 12px) centered on canvas with base track color light grey (#E0E0E0) and an internal fill element (color #2196F3) that starts at 0% width at the left edge of the track. Animation (12s): 0-1s: Title text and progress bar fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-10s: Progress fill grows smoothly from 0% to 100% width left-to-right with ease-out, visually representing the duration; title remains static and fully visible. 10-12s: Hold final completed progress bar and title visible with no motion. Total duration: 12s.

Typewriter Reveal "10 years ago" on Soft Radial Gradient. Radial gradient background from deep purple (#7B1FA2) to blue (#2196F3) with a soft white (#FFFFFF) radial brightness glow in the center. Canvas 1920x1080. Large title text "10 years ago" (96px Arial bold, color #E53935) positioned center within the safe area (at least 60px from all edges). Text starts at full opacity but with 0 characters visible and will be revealed character by character with a typewriter effect. Animation (5s): 0-0.8s: Background and text fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 0.8-3.5s: Text reveals character by character over 2.7s with a typewriter effect, linear easing, showing each letter sequentially until the full phrase "10 years ago" is visible (text remains full opacity during reveal). 3.5-5s: Hold final fully revealed text at center for 1.5s. Total duration: 5s.

Hello World Typewriter Reveal. Dark cinematic charcoal background as a linear gradient top-to-bottom from #0F0F0F to #1C1C1C with a very subtle radial center glow (radial gradient center #141414 fading to fully transparent) to gently highlight the center area; very light film grain overlay using #FFFFFF at 4% opacity to add texture and avoid a flat digital look. Canvas 1920x1080. Large title text 'Hello World' (96px Arial bold, color #E53935) centered on canvas (main content in the center 50% area). Animation (5s): 0-0.5s: Scene background fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out while the 'Hello World' text is present at full opacity but shows 0 characters (typewriter ready). 0.5-4s: Text reveals character by character over 3.5s with a typewriter effect (no simultaneous opacity fade), linear cadence, each character appearing sequentially from left to right; radial center glow remains steady during the reveal. 4-5s: Hold final state with full 'Hello World' text visible, center radial glow and film grain maintained. Total duration: 5s.

Dream Big Build Fast — Word-by-Word Slide-Up. Radial gradient background from #1A1A2E (center) to #0F0F23 (edges) with a very faint soft radial glow in the center using #25253A (subtle, low intensity, not bright white). Canvas 1920x1080. A single large centered title text 'Dream Big Build Fast' (72px Arial bold, color #FFFFFF) placed in the center 50% of the canvas; the text is a single text object with four word groups ('Dream', 'Big', 'Build', 'Fast') that reveal sequentially in place. Animation (4s): 0-0.5s: Scene fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 0.5-1.125s: Word 1 'Dream' slides up from 40px below its final position while fading in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out (smooth slide-up kinetic typography). 1.125-1.75s: Word 2 'Big' slides up from 40px below its final position while fading in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1.75-2.375s: Word 3 'Build' slides up from 40px below its final position while fading in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 2.375-3.0s: Word 4 'Fast' slides up from 40px below its final position while fading in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 3.0-4.0s: Hold final fully revealed title at center. Total duration: 4s.

Centered Three-Element Typewriter Layout. Radial gradient dark cinematic background (radial gradient from #1A1A2E to #0F0F23) with a very soft faint radial glow in the center using white #FFFFFF at very low opacity to gently highlight the center area. Canvas 1920x1080. Three elements side by side (200px horizontal spacing): Left small text 'Before' (36px Arial bold, color #E53935) positioned at middle-left. Center highlighted rectangle (600px wide, 140px tall, rounded corners 12px, fill color #2196F3, text container) centered on canvas containing main text 'HELLO WORLD' (48px Arial bold, color #FFFFFF) centered inside the rectangle. Right small text 'After' (36px Arial bold, color #4CAF50) positioned at middle-right. All objects are within the safe area, at least 200px apart horizontally, and no visible edge is closer than 60px to the canvas edge. Animation (7s): 0-0.8s: All elements fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 0.8-3.15s: Highlight rectangle performs an animated expansion behind the center text, the rectangle's visible width grows from 0% to 100% of 600px from left to right while remaining centered, fill opacity eases to full with ease-out. 3.15-5.5s: Center text 'HELLO WORLD' reveals character by character over 2.35s with typewriter effect (text reveals character by character, no simultaneous opacity fade) with linear timing. 5.5-7s: Hold final state with all elements visible. Total duration: 7s.

Centered Highlight Banner with Typewriter Text. Radial gradient background from deep navy (#0F0F23) at the edges to deep indigo (#1A1A2E) at the center with a very faint soft white (#FFFFFF) radial brightness glow in the exact center (low intensity, 6% opacity). Canvas 1920x1080. A rounded rectangle highlight banner (200px wide, 120px tall, corner radius 20px) filled with red (#E53935) positioned at center. Inside the rounded rectangle, the text 'HELLO WORLD' (48px Arial bold, color blue #2196F3) centered both horizontally and vertically within the rectangle; the text starts at full opacity but with 0 characters visible initially (typewriter reveal). Animation (7s): 0-0.5s: Rounded rectangle and text container fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out; text remains at 0 visible characters during this fade-in. 0.5-5.5s: Text reveals character by character over 5.0s with a typewriter effect (characters appear sequentially, linear easing), the rectangle remains steady at center. 5.5-7s: Hold final state with full text visible and banner steady. Total duration: 7s.

BIG IDEA Pop Overshoot. Radial gradient background from deep navy (#0F0F23) to deep charcoal (#1A1A2E) with a soft white (#FFFFFF) central brightness glow. Canvas 1920x1080. Large centered text 'BIG IDEA' (96px bold Arial, color #E53935) positioned at center within the center 50% area and kept within safe margins (no visible edge closer than 60px to canvas edges). Animation (3.5s): 0-0.5s: Text fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 0.5-1.5s: Text appears with scale pop effect — scales from 0% to 115% (quick overshoot) while remaining centered with ease-out. 1.5-2.5s: Text settles from 115% to 100% with ease-in. 2.5-3.5s: Hold final state at center (final size 100%). Total duration: 3.5s.

FOCUS Sharpness Reveal. Dark background (#0F0F23). Canvas 1920x1080. A single text 'FOCUS' (48px bold Arial, color #E53935) centered on canvas. Text initial state: highly blurred (20px gaussian blur) and slightly transparent (opacity 0.25). Animation (5s): 0-0.5s: Text fades in from opacity 0 to opacity 0.25 with ease-out while remaining blurred at 20px. 0.5-3.5s: Text reveals with blur effect (starts blurred at 20px and sharpens smoothly to 0px) while opacity increases from 0.25 to 1.0 with ease-out; the sharpening and fade occur simultaneously with no position change. 3.5-5s: Hold final state: text fully sharp (0px blur) at full opacity 1.0 with no motion. Total duration: 5s.

Build Something Amazing Slide-Up. Radial gradient background from deep navy (#1A1A2E) to near-black (#0F0F23) with a soft white (#FFFFFF) brightness glow in the center. Canvas 1920x1080. A single text element 'Build Something Amazing' (48px Arial Bold, color #E53935) centered in the canvas within the center 50% area. Animation (5s): 0-0.6s: Text begins to appear — fades in from opacity 0 to 0.6 with ease-out while sliding up from 40px below final position to 15px below final position with ease-in-out (smooth motion, no bounce). 0.6-3.6s: Text continues sliding up from 15px below final position to center while fading from opacity 0.6 to 1 with ease-in-out (smooth slide-up motion). 3.6-5s: Hold final state at center with full opacity. Total duration: 5s.

Centered Underline Highlight. White background (#FFFFFF). Canvas 1920x1080. A bold title text 'IMPORTANT NOTE' (48px Arial bold, color #E53935) centered on canvas. An animated underline (4px tall rectangle, 620px wide, color #2196F3) centered horizontally and positioned 48px below the text baseline. Animation (6s): 0-0.5s: Title text fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 0.5-5s: Underline draws smoothly from left to right beneath the text by expanding its width from 0px to 620px with ease-in-out, anchored to the text center so the line grows evenly outward from the left edge to the right edge. 5-6s: Hold final state with text and fully drawn underline visible. Total duration: 6s.

Highlighted Key Message. Dark background (#1A1A2E). Canvas 1920x1080. A bold text 'KEY MESSAGE' (48px Arial bold, color #E53935) centered on canvas. A rounded rectangle highlight (200px wide, 120px tall, corner radius 12px, color #2196F3) positioned directly behind the text, centered; the highlight's visible width starts at 0% (anchored to its left edge) and will grow horizontally from left to right behind the text. Animation (6s): 0-0.5s: Both text and highlight fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 0.5-4.5s: Highlight expands horizontally from 0% width to 100% width behind the centered text with ease-out, visually revealing the colored bar from left to right while remaining vertically centered behind the text. 4.5-6s: Hold final state with full-width highlight and centered text. Total duration: 6s.

Dream Build Launch — Staggered Word Reveal. Dark radial gradient background from deep navy (#1A1A2E) to near-black (#0F0F23) with a soft white (#FFFFFF) central glow. Canvas 1920x1080. Three text elements stacked (stacked spacing 150px): 'Dream' (64px bold Arial, color #E53935) positioned top-center (150px above center), 'Build' (64px bold Arial, color #2196F3) positioned center, 'Launch' (64px bold Arial, color #4CAF50) positioned bottom-center (150px below center). All three words occupy the center 50% area and are not visible simultaneously; no simultaneous overlap. Animation (6s): 0-0.8s: Background radial gradient and central glow fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out; all three text layers start at opacity 0. 0.8-2.2s: 'Dream' appears — fades in from opacity 0 to 1 while sliding up from 40px below its final position with ease-out; holds visible for the remainder of the phase. 2.2-3.6s: 'Build' appears with the same animation (fades in from opacity 0 to 1 while sliding up from 40px below final position) with ease-out; starts 1.4s after 'Dream' (staggered timing). 3.6-5.0s: 'Launch' appears with the same animation (fades in from opacity 0 to 1 while sliding up from 40px below final position) with ease-out; starts 1.4s after 'Build'. 5.0-6.0s: Hold final state with all three words visible and centered. Total duration: 6s.

Rounded Rectangle with SYSTEM READY Fade-In. White background (#FFFFFF). Canvas 1920x1080. A rounded rectangle (200px wide, 120px tall, corner radius 16px, fill color #E53935) positioned at center. Inside the rectangle, the text 'SYSTEM READY' (48px bold Arial, color #2196F3) centered both horizontally and vertically within the rectangle. Animation (6s): 0-0.75s: Rounded rectangle fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 0.75-4.5s: Text 'SYSTEM READY' fades in from opacity 0 to 1 while remaining centered inside the rectangle with ease-out. 4.5-6s: Hold final state with rectangle and text fully visible. Total duration: 6s.

START Pop With Highlight And Underline. Dark background (#1A1A2E). Canvas 1920x1080. A bold text 'START' (72px Arial bold, color #E53935) centered on canvas. A rounded highlight rectangle (final size 520px wide x 120px tall, corner radius 18px, color #2196F3) positioned directly behind the text and centered. A thin underline (4px tall rounded rectangle, final width 360px, color #4CAF50) positioned centered beneath the text with a 20px gap from the text baseline. Animation (7s): 0-0.5s: All elements fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 0.5-1.75s: Text appears with scale pop effect (scales from 0% to 115%) with ease-out. 1.75-3.0s: Text scale settles from 115% to 100% with ease-in. 3.0-4.25s: Highlight rectangle expands behind the text from 0% width to full 520px width from left to right with ease-out. 4.25-5.5s: Underline draws from left to right increasing width from 0% to 360px with ease-out (animated underline draw). 5.5-7.0s: Hold final state with text at 100%, highlight fully expanded, underline fully drawn. Total duration: 7s.
